summary:
Claim: Gingival ablation is not an etiological agent for gingival recession.  
Evidence: - Etiological agents must actively drive tissue damage; abrasion and inflammation do so via mechanical stress or immune activation. - Ablation describes passive tissue loss (surgical or degenerative) without initiating pathology.  
Answer: B
